classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary A generic MCP Client that can connect to local or remote MCP servers.
 *
 * This class wraps the official MCP SDK Client in a Neo.mjs class structure.
 * It handles the connection lifecycle and tool discovery.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.mcp.client.Client
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 */
classData.summary:
A generic MCP Client that can connect to local or remote MCP servers.

This class wraps the official MCP SDK Client in a Neo.mjs class structure.
It handles the connection lifecycle and tool discovery.
classData.name: Client

classData.comment:
/**
         * @member {String} className='Neo.ai.mcp.client.Client'
         * @protected
         */
classData.name: className

classData.comment:
/**
         * The arguments for the command (e.g. ["./path/to/server.mjs"])
         * @member {String[]|null} args=null // Will be loaded from config
         */
classData.description: The arguments for the command (e.g. ["./path/to/server.mjs"])
classData.name: args

classData.comment:
/**
         * The name of the client to announce to the server
         * @member {String} clientName='Neo.ai.Agent'
         */
classData.description: The name of the client to announce to the server
classData.name: clientName

classData.comment:
/**
         * The version of the client to announce
         * @member {String} clientVersion='1.0.0'
         */
classData.description: The version of the client to announce
classData.name: clientVersion

classData.comment:
/**
         * The command to run (e.g. "node")
         * @member {String|null} command=null // Will be loaded from config
         */
classData.description: The command to run (e.g. "node")
classData.name: command

classData.comment:
/**
         * Path to a custom client configuration file.
         * @member {String|null} configFile=null
         */
classData.description: Path to a custom client configuration file.
classData.name: configFile

classData.description: Environment variables to pass to the spawned process
classData.name: env

classData.comment:
/**
         * Path to the OpenAPI spec for this server (if available).
         * @member {String|null} openApiFilePath=null
         */
classData.description: Path to the OpenAPI spec for this server (if available).
classData.name: openApiFilePath

classData.comment:
/**
         * List of environment variable names required by the server.
         * @member {String[]} requiredEnv=[]
         */
classData.description: List of environment variable names required by the server.
classData.name: requiredEnv

classData.description: Additional SDK transport options for HTTP/SSE transports.
classData.name: transportOptions

classData.comment:
/**
         * Transport type to use: 'stdio', 'sse', or 'streamable-http'.
         * @member {String} transportType='stdio'
         */
classData.description: Transport type to use: 'stdio', 'sse', or 'streamable-http'.
classData.name: transportType

classData.comment:
/**
         * Remote MCP endpoint URL for HTTP/SSE transports.
         * @member {String|null} url=null
         */
classData.description: Remote MCP endpoint URL for HTTP/SSE transports.
classData.name: url

classData.comment:
/**
         * The logical name of the MCP server to connect to (e.g., 'github-workflow').
         * This name will be used to look up connection details from ClientConfig.
         * @member {String} serverName_='github-workflow'
         * @reactive
         */
classData.description: The logical name of the MCP server to connect to (e.g., 'github-workflow'). This name will be used to look up connection details from ClientConfig.
classData.name: serverName_

classData.comment:
/**
     * The MCP SDK Client instance.
     * @member {McpSdkClient|null} client=null
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: The MCP SDK Client instance.
classData.name: client

classData.comment:
/**
     * Connection state of the client.
     * @member {Boolean} connected=false
     */
classData.description: Connection state of the client.
classData.name: connected

classData.description: Map of tool schemas keyed by tool name (from listTools).
classData.name: toolSchemas

classData.comment:
/**
     * The ToolService instance for validation and management.
     * @member {ToolService|null} toolService=null
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: The ToolService instance for validation and management.
classData.name: toolService

classData.comment:
/**
     * The Transport instance.
     * @member {StdioClientTransport|null} transport=null
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: The Transport instance.
classData.name: transport

classData.comment:
/**
     * @protected
     * @param {String} value
     * @param {String} oldValue
     */
classData.name: afterSetServerName

classData.comment:
/**
     * @summary Creates the SDK transport for the configured server connection.
     *
     * Local servers use stdio process spawning, while remote endpoints use the SDK's URL-based
     * SSE or Streamable HTTP transports with the configured transport options.
     * @returns {StdioClientTransport|SSEClientTransport|StreamableHTTPClientTransport}
     * @throws {Error} When the configured transport is unknown or incomplete.
     */
classData.summary:
Creates the SDK transport for the configured server connection.

Local servers use stdio process spawning, while remote endpoints use the SDK's URL-based
SSE or Streamable HTTP transports with the configured transport options.

exceptions.description: When the configured transport is unknown or incomplete.

classData.name: createTransport

classData.comment:
/**
     * @summary Creates a URL object for remote MCP SDK transports.
     *
     * Accepts a configured string or pre-built URL instance and keeps the fail-fast error tied
     * to the normalized transport type that requested it.
     * @param {String} transportType The normalized transport type.
     * @returns {URL}
     * @throws {Error} When no remote URL is configured.
     */
classData.summary:
Creates a URL object for remote MCP SDK transports.

Accepts a configured string or pre-built URL instance and keeps the fail-fast error tied
to the normalized transport type that requested it.

exceptions.description: When no remote URL is configured.

classData.name: createTransportUrl

classData.description: Calls a tool on the server.
classData.name: callTool

classData.description: Closes the connection.
classData.name: close

classData.description: Cleanup when the instance is destroyed
classData.name: destroy

classData.description: Lists available tools from the server.
classData.name: listTools

classData.comment:
/**
     * Loads the server connection details from the ClientConfig singleton.
     * @param {String} serverName The name of the server to load.
     * @protected
     */
classData.description: Loads the server connection details from the ClientConfig singleton.

params.description: The name of the server to load.
params.name: serverName

classData.name: loadServerConfig

classData.comment:
/**
     * @summary Normalizes supported transport aliases to canonical config values.
     *
     * Preserves unknown values so `createTransport()` can produce the single authoritative
     * unsupported-transport error instead of silently coercing configuration typos.
     * @param {String} transportType The configured transport type or alias.
     * @returns {String}
     */
classData.summary:
Normalizes supported transport aliases to canonical config values.

Preserves unknown values so `createTransport()` can produce the single authoritative
unsupported-transport error instead of silently coercing configuration typos.
classData.name: normalizeTransportType
